nodes.label: End-to-end test: create thread → auto-recall → do work → retain → recall again.
Mock that tracks retained content and returns it on recall.
1. Create thread (auto-recall, empty at first)     2. Retain learnings     3. Cr
All memory commands are no-ops when disabled.
The old 'Recent conversation' block must not appear in output.
Thread summary is shown inline under the topic label in the Topics list.
No 'Summary:' line is emitted when the thread has no summary.
The Active Threads section header is present in v2 format.
Current thread appears in the Active Threads block.
Closed threads appear in Closed (within TTL) section.
Archived threads are not shown in v2 context injection (cockpit only).
Key decisions ARE injected for Tier 1 (active) threads in v2.
Open questions ARE injected for Tier 1 (active) threads in v2.
Summaries for all threads (including non-current) appear in the Topics list.
Running threads show '🏃 running' in v2 format.
Tests for juggle_hindsight.py — Hindsight HTTP API client.
Mock Hindsight API server for testing.
Start a mock Hindsight server on a random port.
Recall against unreachable host should timeout and return empty.
Tests for stale-agent reaping at 12h TTL.
Reaper should not remove agents idle < 12h.
Reaper should not reap busy agents whose pane still exists.
Busy agent whose pane no longer exists should be reaped immediately.
Reaper should never reap agent assigned to current thread.
Reaper should call db.delete_agent directly when pane no longer exists.
Medium strip must include topic title text, not just label.
Narrow strip must include topic title text, not just label.
Each topic must occupy its own line — not merged into one horizontal bar.
topics_strip size must grow when topics_count increases.
Action text must appear verbatim — never as a dict repr.
With scroll_offset=1, first action must not appear in output.
Title must include ↑N indicator when offset > 0.
Active pane must use bright_blue border.
Offset beyond list length must not raise — just shows empty table.
With scroll_offset=1, first sorted agent is hidden.
render_into with scroll_offsets must hide first action row.
Active pane panel must have a different border than inactive panes.
Golden snapshot tests for cockpit view layer.  Run with UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS=1 to re
Tests for Task 9 one-shot lifecycle data migration.
Insert a thread row with raw status (bypasses set_thread_status guards).
Tests for Task 2 thread state helpers.
run() must use Rich Live, not raw sys.stdout writes.
Full pipeline: DB → snapshot → render_into → no exception.
clear-pending-decision should remove entries by tool_use_id.
Hooks should silently skip if user is in main thread.
Tests for JuggleTmuxManager — subprocess calls are mocked.
Return a mock CompletedProcess with returncode=0.
Tests for Task 8 fail-agent transient/persistent routing.
Tests for memory-related CLI subcommands: recall, recall-if-cold, retain.
Return env dict with test DB and mock Hindsight config.
Create a started DB with a thread, return thread label.
When hindsight is disabled, recall returns empty.
When hindsight is disabled, retain is a silent no-op.
Creating a thread should auto-recall and store memory_context.
Tests for JuggleDB agents table and related methods.
Tests for Task 6 cockpit model v2.
Guard that agent prompt templates reference the new commands.
create_thread returns a UUID (not a letter).
Sequential threads get sequential user_labels A, B.
get_recent_exchanges returns last n Q/A pairs, most recent first.
get_recent_exchanges returns None assistant when none exists yet.
get_recent_exchanges returns empty list when no messages.
get_thread_state returns 👉 for the current thread.
get_thread_state returns 🗄️ for threads inactive > 48 hours.
get_thread_state returns ⏸️ when last assistant message ends with ?.
get_thread_state returns 💤 when last assistant message has no ? and inactive > 3
get_thread_state returns empty string for recently active threads with no questi
get_thread_state returns ⏸️ for done threads where last assistant msg ends with
get_thread_state returns ✅ for done threads where user replied after assistant q
get_thread_state returns ⏸️ for done threads where only junk messages follow the
get_last_exchange should skip junk user messages and fall back to the previous r
archive_thread does not delete the thread row.
New threads have show_in_list=1 by default.
No candidates when only one active thread exists.
A done thread (non-current) is a candidate.
A failed thread (non-current) is a candidate.
A thread inactive > 48 hours (not background/waiting) is a candidate.
Current thread is never a candidate even if it would otherwise qualify.
Already-archived threads are excluded from candidates.
Background threads inactive > 48h are NOT candidates (excluded by status filter)
create_thread() returns a UUID string, not a letter.
threads table has 'id' and 'user_label'; 'label' and 'thread_id' are absent.
Existing DBs with thread_id column are migrated: id=letter, label=letter.
get_thread() accepts UUID and returns dict with 'id' and 'user_label'.
get_all_threads() returns dicts with both 'id' and 'user_label'.
archive_thread sets status='archived' and preserves user_label.
user_label is permanent — archiving thread A does not free 'A' for reuse.
unarchive_thread return value is the thread's user_label.
create → archive → unarchive produces expected state.
Tests for juggle agent domain isolation (v1.5.0).
Thread with domain=null only gets agents with domain=null.
Thread with domain=null and only domain-stamped agents → None (spawn fresh).
Thread with domain='juggle' accepts domain='juggle' agents.
Thread with domain='juggle' also accepts domain=null (fresh) agents.
Thread with domain='juggle' must NOT reuse domain='vault' agent.
Juggle agent is never returned for a vault thread.
Within matching domain agents, context_threads scoring still applies.
Run juggle_cli.py with a test DB path, override DB_PATH via env.
archive-thread sets status=archived and prints confirmation.
Prints 'No archive candidates.' when nothing qualifies.
Lists a done non-current thread as a candidate.
Already-archived threads do not appear in candidate list.
unarchive-thread restores thread and prints 'Thread X unarchived.
show-topics does not display threads with show_in_list=0.
Extracts last sentence containing ? from assistant message.
When no ? in assistant message, shows user message as 📬 prompt.
Questions longer than 80 chars are truncated.
User messages longer than 60 chars are truncated with ...
Returns generic fallback when no messages.
_last_sentences returns up to max_chars of stripped text.
Text longer than max_chars is truncated.
⏸️ thread shows 🤔 decision prompt instead of Last: Q/A block.
Set env var so juggle_tmux uses a mock pane instead of real tmux.
spawn-agent should print agent_id and pane_id.
send-task should append release-agent call and invoke send_task on manager.
Regression test: DB_PATH is invariant under CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA.
Verify DB_PATH doesn't change when CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA env var is set.
Verify DB_PATH is absolute and properly expanded.
